etymology.description: дәЎ (tip of a blade) + еҲҖ (knife) = perhaps indicating damage
etymology.interpretation: The character еҢ„ (gГ i, "original meaning unknown") combines дәЎ(дәЎ) (wГЎng, "tip of a blade") and еҲҖ(еҲҖ) (dДҒo, "knife") to potentially represent an idea connected to the edge or damage inflicted by a blade. The exact original meaning is not entirely clear, but it suggests some form of impairment or damage related to knife usage.
